description: CompositionGreen and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-arm tab, a spread collar, full buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest, embroidery on the right chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryClassic Benetton style shirt for men. This united colors of benetton shirt with its soft, luxe fabric is perfect for the fashion conscious urban male. Fold up the sleeves and sport a casual look for off-duty outings  or team it with formal pants for a classy formal style.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
